
Selectivity {data-navmenu="Model"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Selectivity at Age

```{r sel_age}
mv_plot_selectivity(
  df      = mv$selectivity_at_age,
  by_sex  = length(sexes) > 1,
  title   = "Selectivity at Age"
)
```

### Selectivity by Sex

```{r sel_sex, eval=length(sexes) > 1}
mv_plot_selectivity(
  df      = mv$selectivity_at_age,
  by_sex  = TRUE,
  title   = "Selectivity by Sex"
)
```

### Release Probability

```{r rel_prob, eval=!is.null(mv$release_probability)}
mv_plot_selectivity(
  df     = mv$release_probability,
  by_sex = length(sexes) > 1,
  ylab   = "Release probability",
  title  = "Release Probability at Age"
)
```
